content.text:
**Gemma2 Model Discussion**
- Gemma2 features an improved context window and multi-modal capabilities.
- Concerns exist about its 12B parameter size being too large for local setups.
- Plans to test it once available on Ollama.

**SpacetimeDB for Game State Management**
- SpacetimeDB was suggested as a tool for managing game states.
- Some prefer decoupling the database and server but suggest an automated server tool for setup.
- Coolify was mentioned as a deployment solution with Docker-Compose support.

**Hyperfy AI Agent & Coding Guides**
- Links to Hyperfy AI agent and coding guides were shared.
- Plans to update AI coding guides and add community-generated super prompts.

**MCP Server & Claude Interface**
- Troubleshooting MCP server integration with Claude’s desktop interface.
- Goal: Make it functionally useful for broader experimentation.

**Model Instancing in Hyperfy V1 & V2**
- Instanced models in Hyperfy V1 still load textures separately, increasing file size and server load.
- Solution: Use `alt+D` in Blender for linked duplicates and apply a script in `gltf.report` to instance the GLB.
- Hyperfy V2 auto-instances linked duplicates from Blender, eliminating manual instancing.

**Texture Optimization for Low-Poly Builds**
- Ensuring efficient texture usage when instancing models in Hyperfy V1.
- Solution: Use AI-generated image planes (e.g., Krea.ai) and project them onto low-poly extruded models for lightweight, visually rich environments.

**Community Update Format Discussion**
- Debate between using big montages vs. detailed threads.
- Consensus: Threads perform better for engagement, while montages have broader appeal.

**Hyperfy Token Visibility**
- Lack of direct links to token-related resources on the Hyperfy website.
- A dedicated token site exists at [token.hyperfy.xyz](https://token.hyperfy.xyz), and a new website is in development.

categories.title: Recent Technical Discussions and Updates in Hyperfy Community

content.text:
### Technical Discussions & Decisions
- **Event System Naming:** Discussion on renaming `app.emit` to `world.emit` for clarity. Decision: Keep `app.emit` for sending events to other clients.
- **Client-Server Event Handling:** `_saori_` shared a script for handling item pickup/drop events. `app.send` is used for communication, but `app.broadcast` was suggested for clarity.
- **Procedural City Generation:** `nightshiffty` shared an infinite procedural city system with potential improvements like LODs.
- **Instanced Geometry Issue:** `nightshiffty` asked about preventing clones from using the same instanced geometry. `ashxn.eth` suggested `mesh.linked=false`, but it didn’t work as expected.
- **Queue System for Multiplayer Worlds:** `knar33` proposed a global queue system for matchmaking across worlds. `_saori_` preferred a built-in `player.route('instance')` function instead.
- **GLTF Loader Error:** `_saori_` encountered a `ReferenceError: Image is not defined` when adding a model with colliders. Issue linked to trimesh updates. `ashxn.eth` pushed a fix.
- **Math Functions Bug:** `_saori_` reported `math.sqrt` breaking in procedural city. `ashxn.eth` fixed missing math functions.
- **CPU-Based Particle System:** `ashxn.eth` introduced a new CPU-based particle system with collision support.
- **Butterfly Rotation Issue:** `gertjanakerboom` struggled with AI-generated code rotating individual wings instead of the whole butterfly. `ashxn.eth` suggested using an empty node as a parent for wings.

### Gemma2 Model & SpacetimeDB Discussion
- **Gemma2 Model:** `d_maximus` highlighted its improved context window and multi-modal capabilities. Concern: 12B parameter size may be too large for local setups. Plan: Test once available on Ollama.
- **SpacetimeDB for Game State Management:** `d_maximus` shared SpacetimeDB as a potential tool. `somethingmoreprofessional` prefers decoupling DB and server but suggests an automated server tool for setup. `0xpeezy` mentioned Coolify as a deployment solution with Docker-Compose support.
- **Hyperfy AI Agent & Coding Guides:** `0mka_` shared links to Hyperfy AI agent and coding guides. Plans to update AI coding guides and add community-generated super prompts.
- **MCP Server & Claude Interface:** `rickydata1` is troubleshooting MCP server integration with Claude’s desktop interface. Goal: Make it functionally useful for broader experimentation.

### Model Instancing & Texture Optimization in Hyperfy
- **Model Instancing in Hyperfy V1 & V2:**
  - **Problem:** Instanced models in Hyperfy V1 still load textures separately, increasing file size and server load.
  - **Solution:** Use `alt+D` in Blender for linked duplicates, then apply a script in `gltf.report` to instance the GLB.
  - **Hyperfy V2 Improvement:** Auto-instances linked duplicates from Blender, eliminating the need for manual instancing.
- **Texture Optimization for Low-Poly Builds:**
  - **Problem:** Ensuring efficient texture usage when instancing models in Hyperfy V1.
  - **Solution:** Use AI-generated image planes (e.g., Krea.ai) and project them onto low-poly extruded models for lightweight, visually rich environments.
- **Community Update Format Discussion:** Threads perform better for engagement, while montages have broader appeal.
- **Hyperfy Token Visibility:** Lack of direct links to token-related resources on the Hyperfy website. A dedicated token site exists at [token.hyperfy.xyz](https://token.hyperfy.xyz), and a new website is in development.

### New Version Release & Model App Update
- **New Version Release:** `toxsam` announced a new version of Open Source Avatars and requested feedback.
- **Ground Object Removal:** `mugenomics_14022` asked about removing the ground object in a world file. `_saori_` clarified that it is part of `base-environment.glb`, resolving the issue.
- **Model App Update:** `ashxn.eth` developed a Model app allowing users to load `.glb` files with toggles for collision and scale. This required core updates for geometry sharing. `ashxn.eth` plans to share the app and push changes soon.
- **Documentation Update:** `0mka_` updated the Hyperfy avatar guide, adding a section for Open Source Avatars.
